Partial, edge-cropped dark brown leather shoe (toe and upper) visible in low light; rounded toe with scuffed, worn surface and warm brown tones, photographed close-up — approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Wall-mounted rectangular glass mirror with a frameless appearance, roughly 1.0–1.2 m wide, mounted above a sink; mirror surface is reflective and shows a white interior door, a tripod-mounted camera and a bedside lamp in the reflection. A small round magnifying mirror is attached to the upper-right of the glass; the left and top/right edges show cropping and visual artifacts/warping (digital reconstruction noise) rather than clean trim. Appears about 1.5 m from the camera.

Close-up of a curved chrome/gooseneck faucet spout with a tubular shape, slight surface discoloration and light reflection; the object is partially edge-cropped and slightly blurred in the crop, approximately 0.3 m from the camera.
Small chrome faucet with a curved reflective spout and adjacent knob-like shapes, heavily blurred and partially edge-cropped in the frame; appears metallic and close to the camera (approx. 0.5 m).

Close-up of a white glazed ceramic sink showing the curved oval rim and top of the basin with a smooth glossy surface and slight shadowing; the basin is edge-cropped at the bottom of the image and appears to be about 0.4 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped white ceramic sink rim and shallow basin with a glossy finish, faint beige discoloration and a small dark drain/fixture visible near the center-top of the crop; slightly blurred and photographed at approximately 0.5 m from the camera.

Upright white plastic lotion/shampoo bottle with a rectangular blue lower label and blurred dark printed text, narrow neck with a darker cap visible; image is low-resolution and slightly blurry so some text/detail is indistinct — estimated ~0.5 m from camera.

Vertical, rectangular silver-framed wall mirror shown partially cropped at the edges, with a reflective surface that displays a tripod and nearby wall; surface appears warped and contains digital reconstruction artifacts; estimated ~2.0 m from camera.

White plastic rectangular wall-mounted outlet faceplate, mostly visible but slightly blurred and low-resolution with faint colored markings and possible duplex/GFCI features; appears slightly edge-cropped and photographed from about 1.0 m away.

Transparent disposable plastic cup (tall, tapered cylindrical shape) with a blue rim or lid visible at the top; upright and slightly edge-cropped at the bottom, with faint vertical dark markings on the side; image is low-resolution and slightly blurred, appears close to the camera (~0.4 m).

White plastic rectangular duplex outlet faceplate shown vertically in the crop; image is blurry and low-resolution with a faint greenish color cast, and two socket openings are only faintly visible — appears photographed from close range (approx. 0.8 m).
Polished chrome faucet spout and part of its base visible in a close-up, edge-cropped image; curved metallic surface with strong reflections and slight blur, approximately 0.5 m from the camera.

Partial edge-cropped close-up of a chrome/metallic faucet showing the upper rounded cylindrical spout and reflective surface; the crop is slightly blurred and low-resolution, showing only part of the fixture roughly 0.4 m from the camera.

Short squat clear plastic bottle with a white/pale label showing faint red printing; translucent body and visible screw-top rim, upright but slightly blurred and partially edge-cropped in the image (approx. 0.4 m from camera).

Ceiling-mounted fan with wood-tone blades (four visible) radiating from a dark/brass motor housing and a frosted glass light globe that is illuminated; fan is slightly edge-cropped at the right and appears about 3.0 meters from the camera.

Large bed (appears king-size) with a white-and-gray horizontal striped duvet and matching pillows, dark wooden footboard visible in the foreground; the bed fills most of the lower half of the crop and is slightly cropped at the left/right edges, camera approximately 1.8 meters from the footboard.

Lit table lamp with a beige, pleated fabric shade (scalloped lower edge) producing a warm yellow glow; dark rounded pedestal base (wood or ceramic) visible below the shade but partially cropped at the right edge of the crop; image is low-resolution and slightly blurred. Approximate distance from camera ~0.8 m.

Partial, edge-cropped close-up of a rectangular beige pillow with horizontal light-beige to tan stripes, woven fabric texture and visible seam lines; pillow appears soft and slightly compressed and is likely photographed at about 0.6 m distance.

Partial view of a large bed with a striped beige/white/gray quilted bedspread draped over a dark wooden footboard; left side is slightly edge-cropped and a pillow is partially visible at the upper left — approximate camera distance ~1.5 m.

Close-up of a white plastic rectangular wall-mounted duplex outlet faceplate, vertically oriented and partially edge-cropped in the image; the crop is low-resolution and slightly blurred, photographed from roughly 0.5 m away.

Partial edge-cropped view of a dark brown wooden nightstand showing a varnished glossy top edge and carved decorative molding on the drawer front with visible surface wear and scuffs; appears roughly 1.2 meters from the camera.

Rectangular interior window occupying most of the crop, fitted with closed white horizontal vinyl/blind slats and framed by dark side curtains; top valance and a small portion of a wooden sill are visible, no exterior view seen, approximate distance from camera ~2.0 m.

Partial crop of a light gray rectangular pillow showing an edge with a visible seam and subtle woven/linen-like texture and soft wrinkles; pillow is cut off by the image border and appears close to the camera (≈0.6 m).

Partial, edge-cropped close-up of a brown leather-like shoe toe with a rounded shape and visible scuffing along the upper and darker sole; image is low-resolution and slightly blurred, photographed at close range (approximately 0.3 m from the camera).

Large rectangular frameless wall-mounted mirror with a silvered reflective surface showing a door and tripod in reflection; appears slightly warped with visible rendering/artifacting and is edge-cropped at the top and sides — mounted above a sink about 1.5 m from the camera.
Partial close-up of a curved chrome/brushed-metal faucet spout, edge-cropped and slightly blurred with a smooth reflective surface; estimated distance from camera ~0.4 m.

Small chrome sink faucet assembly with a curved spout and two rounded handles, reflective metallic finish; image is blurred/low-resolution and the object is partially cut off by the crop, approximately 0.6 meters from the camera.

Tall white plastic personal-care bottle with a blue rectangular label on the mid-to-lower body and smaller dark printed logo/text near the shoulder; upright, slightly blurred and low-resolution, mostly visible but with a minor top-edge crop, photographed at close range (approximately 0.6 m).

Wall-mounted rectangular frameless mirror with a glossy reflective surface, vertically oriented and partially cropped by the image edges; it reflects a tripod and a door, shows noticeable digital reconstruction/warping artifacts, and appears roughly 2.0 meters from the camera.

Wall-mounted white plastic rectangular outlet plate, vertically oriented and centered in the crop, appearing blurred and low-resolution; plate and socket details are visible but soft/fuzzy (approx. 1.3 m from camera).

Close-up view of a white, layered petal-like lampshade composed of overlapping thin fabric or paper panels with soft curved edges and a slightly translucent, high-key surface; the object is partially edge-cropped in the frame and appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m).

Partial wall-mounted rectangular mirror with a thin silver/chrome frame and reflective glass; mirror is edge-cropped in the crop and shows a tripod and a blurred person in its reflection, appears vertical and medium-sized, with some visual distortion — estimated ~1.5 m from the camera.

Close-up (~0.4 m) of a tall transparent plastic cup with a blue rim or lid and vertical dark printed markings on the side; tapered cylindrical shape, slightly blurred/low-resolution, and the object is partially cropped by the image edge.

Blurry white plastic rectangular duplex outlet faceplate visible near center of the crop; low-contrast and slightly green-tinted, with two plug openings and a faint central screw visible — appears out of focus and somewhat washed-out, likely about 0.8 meters from the camera.

Ceiling-mounted fan with a lit frosted glass globe light and five dark brown/bronze blades; metal motor housing visible; blades extend toward image edges and are partially cropped at the left, indicating an edge-cropped view; appears mid-size (roughly 1.0–1.2 m diameter) and about 2.5 m from the camera.

Large bed with white and gray striped bedspread and matching pillows, set on a dark-stained wooden footboard; bed occupies most of the crop, sides are slightly edge-cropped and the top of the mattress and pillows are visible from a frontal viewpoint — approximate distance ~1.8 m from camera.

Beige/cream pleated fabric lampshade with scalloped lower rim over a turned dark-brown base (appears to be wood or ceramic); lamp is lit with a warm yellow glow and the lower/side of the base is partially cropped by the image border — approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Plump rectangular beige-and-light-brown horizontally striped fabric pillow with a woven texture, slightly rumpled and pressed flat at the front; the pillow is partially edge-cropped in the image and appears in the foreground at approximately 0.6 meters from the camera.

Partial crop showing the front/foot of a bed with a white-and-gray vertically striped quilt or comforter draped over the mattress, hanging over a dark brown wooden footboard; left side is edge-cropped and the camera is approximately 1.0 m from the bed.

Blurry, low-resolution close-up of a vertical white plastic electrical outlet/faceplate resembling a GFCI module with a centered rectangular receptacle and small printed buttons/text; plate is wall-mounted, appears slightly edge-cropped on the left, and is approximately 0.5 m from the camera.

Dark brown wooden nightstand showing carved decorative molding and two visible drawer fronts with round metal knobs; glossy finish with some surface wear, viewed in a partial/edge-cropped close-up (approximately 1.0 m from camera).

Rectangular interior window filling most of the crop with lowered white horizontal blinds (plastic/metal slats) that are mostly closed, framed by dark black fabric curtains on both sides; faint daylight filters through small slat gaps. Window appears fully visible (not edge-cropped) and mounted in a light-colored frame; estimated distance from camera ~2.5 meters.

Partial, edge-cropped light beige rectangular fabric pillow with visible seam/piping and soft stuffed form, showing subtle horizontal shading and slight wrinkles; appears to be a close-up shot (approximately 0.5 m from the camera).
clusters.representative_description: Partial edge-cropped close-up of a chrome/metallic faucet showing the upper rounded cylindrical spout and reflective surface; the crop is slightly blurred and low-resolution, showing only part of the fixture roughly 0.4 m from the camera.
